name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit to $4,000, and title loans to $4,000 with same-day or next-day funding at physical Memphis locations.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a storefront lending company operating multiple locations across Memphis, Tennessee, and other states. The company specializes in short-term emergency lending products designed to provide quick access to cash for consumers facing immediate financial needs. The Memphis Summer Avenue location operates with extended hours (9am–7pm most weekdays) to accommodate working customers seeking in-person service.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (up to $425 with repayment due on the next payday), Lines of Credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw-down and repayment over time), and Title Loans (up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral). Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot prepaid card services. Customers can apply online or complete applications in-store with staff assistance, and the company emphasizes transparency about loan terms before signing.

SpeedyDash differentiates itself through in-store service with live staff support, allowing borrowers to ask questions during the application and document-signing process. The company positions itself on convenience and speed—with the slogan "Tomorrow can be payday®"—and maintains a multi-location presence across Memphis to serve neighborhood customers. The physical retail model contrasts with purely online lenders, offering face-to-face interaction for those uncomfortable with digital-only processes.

However, payday and title loans inherently carry high costs that may not be fully transparent in marketing materials. While the website states borrowers "will know exactly how much it costs to borrow," specific APRs and finance charges are not disclosed on the store locator page. The loans are structured as short-term products, meaning borrowers must repay quickly or risk debt cycles. For consumers without strong credit, these represent expensive emergency options compared to payday-alternative lenders or credit union PALs.
pros: Offers same-day or next-day funding for emergency cash needs
No specific credit score requirement mentioned; accessible to those with poor/no credit
In-store application with live staff support to answer questions before signing
Flexible lines of credit up to $4,000 with draw-down flexibility as needs fluctuate
Title loans leverage vehicle equity for larger loan amounts up to $4,000
Multiple locations across Memphis (9 stores listed) for neighborhood convenience
Additional money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) in-store
Transparent pre-application information available in-store and online
cons: APRs and total finance charges not disclosed on website; actual cost of borrowing unclear
Payday loans ($425 max) are extremely small and require full repayment within ~2 weeks, creating debt cycle risk
Title loans require vehicle collateral, risking loss of transportation if repayment fails
Short repayment terms make monthly debt obligations difficult for low-income borrowers
In Alabama, title lending is structured as 30-day pawns rather than traditional loans, indicating regulatory restrictions
best_for: Workers facing urgent cash shortfalls between paychecks who prefer in-person service
Vehicle owners needing $1,000–$4,000 quickly who can afford title loan repayment
Consumers uncomfortable with online-only lending who value face-to-face staff interaction
Individuals with poor credit or no credit history unable to access traditional bank loans
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for working-age consumers in immediate financial crisis who prefer in-person service and understand the high cost of short-term lending. The main caveat is that payday and title loans are expensive emergency products—useful for true one-time shortfalls but dangerous if used repeatedly, as the high costs and quick repayment terms create debt cycles. Borrowers should exhaust payday-alternative options (credit union PALs, employer advances) before applying here.
services: Green Dot prepaid Visa debit cards
In-store loan applications and document signing
Vehicle appraisals for title loan collateral
